requests.prompt: A finished cloisonne enamel tripod ding censer (Jingtailan) slowly emerging from soft ink wash gradients in Chinese ink wash animation style, large white space background, faint distant mountain silhouettes in pale ink, subtle ink blots spreading like ripples on water, the vessel rendered in gongbi fine brushwork with golden wire and gemstone-colored enamel (blue, green, cinnabar red), hand-painted brush texture, soft diffused lighting,8K detail,16:9 cinematic composition
